event: Ceremonial Meeting of the State Council on May 7, 1901
description: A monumental group portrait depicting the ceremonial meeting of the Russian State Council on May 7, 1901, marking its centennial anniversary. The scene takes place in a grand semicircular hall with tall Corinthian columns, crystal chandeliers, and large portraits on the walls. Dozens of officials in ornate uniforms and ceremonial sashes — predominantly red — are seated and standing around tables covered with red cloth and arranged in a semicircular pattern. A standing figure at center appears to be addressing the assembly.

_meta.title: Ceremonial Meeting of the State Council on May 7, 1901
